description: Zephyr Scale on self-hosted Jira Server/DC: test cases, cycles, executions, plans and attachments
name: io.github.vilaabo/zephyr-scale-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Jira base URL without a trailing slash, e.g. https://jira.example.com
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Jira Data Center Personal Access Token (used when JIRA_AUTH=pat, the default)
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_PAT

environmentVariables.description: Project key used when a tool is called without projectKey
environmentVariables.name: ZEPHYR_DEFAULT_PROJECT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: true registers UNOFFICIAL tools backed by the internal /rest/tests/1.0 API: folder tree, folder deletion, exact status names
environmentVariables.name: ZEPHYR_ALLOW_INTERNAL_API

environmentVariables.description: false allows self-signed certificates (disables TLS verification)
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED
